common.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

home.heroDescription: Discover internships, scholarships, and international programs curated for students and youth in Uzbekistan.
home.exploreDescription: Find the right opportunity for your goals
home.latestDesc: Fresh listings added by our AI scouter and community
home.aiTitle: We find opportunities so you don't have to
home.aiDesc: Our AI scouter monitors 50+ sources worldwide, automatically discovering internships, scholarships, and programs — and posts them here before you even know they exist.
home.aiDiscoveryDesc: Our scouter scans Erasmus+, DAAD, Chevening, UN, and dozens more sources every 6 hours.
home.aiUpdatesDesc: New opportunities are published automatically. No manual curation delays — you see them as they appear.
home.aiVerifiedDesc: Every listing is quality-checked. No scams, no expired posts — just real opportunities for real students.
home.ctaDesc: Create a free account to save opportunities, track applications, and get personalized recommendations.

categories.internshipsDesc: Gain hands-on experience at top companies worldwide
categories.scholarshipsDesc: Fund your education with merit-based opportunities
categories.programsDesc: Join exchange programs and international initiatives
categories.volunteeringDesc: Make an impact through volunteer opportunities

listings.title: Browse Opportunities
listings.description: Find internships, scholarships, and programs worldwide

post.title: Post an Opportunity
post.description: Share an internship, scholarship, or program with students in Uzbekistan
post.descPlaceholder: Describe the opportunity, requirements, and benefits...
post.successDesc: Your listing has been submitted for review. It will appear on the platform once approved by our team.
post.asOrgDesc: Post on behalf of a company or organization

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your saved opportunities and application progress
dashboard.noApplicationsHint: Start tracking by clicking "Track Application" on any listing

auth.loginDesc: Log in to your InternGo account
auth.name: Full name
auth.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

footer.tagline: Discover internships, scholarships, and international programs. Your gateway to global opportunities.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.connectTelegramDesc: Connect your Telegram to get notified about new opportunities
profile.interestsDesc: Set your interests to filter opportunities on the site and receive matching notifications via Telegram bot.
profile.selectType: Select at least one type to receive notifications
profile.countriesPlaceholder: e.g. USA, Germany, Japan, South Korea
profile.countriesHint: Comma-separated. Leave empty for all countries.
profile.notifDisabled: Connect Telegram first to enable notifications

about.title: About Us
about.heading: About InternGo
about.mission: Our mission is to help students in Uzbekistan discover global opportunities.
about.aiPoweredDesc: Our AI scouter monitors 50+ sources every 6 hours, automatically discovering new opportunities.
about.communityDesc: Organizations and individuals can post opportunities directly for students.
about.builtForDesc: Specifically designed for students and youth in Uzbekistan seeking international opportunities.
about.verifiedDesc: Every listing is quality-checked to ensure no scams or expired posts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you soon.
